summary_en: Userbase Corp. tender offer for all Global Information shares and warrant units at ¥1,680/share and ¥144,200/warrant unit. Minimum acceptance threshold 1,983,600 shares (66.83% of voting rights). Offer period May 21 – July 1, 2026 (30 business days). Board recommends tendering. Intent: full subsidiary status and delisting.
title_en: Notice of Board Opinion Supporting and Recommending Participation in Public Tender Offer for Company Shares and Warrant Units by Userbase Corporation
translation_en_brief: On May 20, 2026, Global Information's board approved and recommended shareholder participation in a tender offer by Userbase Corporation for all outstanding Global Information shares and warrant units. The offer price is ¥1,680 per share and ¥144,200 per warrant unit. The tender period runs from May 21 to July 1, 2026 (30 business days), with a minimum acceptance threshold of 1,983,600 shares, representing 66.83% of voting rights. Userbase intends to acquire 100% of Global Information shares and warrant units to make the company a wholly owned subsidiary, with subsequent delisting from the TSE Standard market. The board decision was made after determining there is no maximum cap on share acquisitions. Userbase was incorporated in October 2022 as a special-purpose vehicle to acquire shares of the former Userbase Corporation (delisted February 2023); it is currently 94.91% owned by The Shaper Holdings L.P. The board resolution was approved by all non-interested directors, including audit committee members, to ensure fairness.
